pidgie._designNotes: Sky (#4A9BD9) is the brand primary (website + dashboard). Iris (#7B6B8A) is the chat widget primary. FAB gradient: Iris to Shimmer (#3DAB8F). Fonts: Plus Jakarta Sans / Figtree / Comfortaa (wordmark).

receptia._designNotes: Navy (#1B2A4A) is the brand primary (website, widget, dashboard). Copper (#C67D4A) is the accent. Fonts: Urbanist / DM Sans / Playfair Display (wordmark).

runwell._designNotes: Ember (#e8420e) is the primary across website, widget, and dashboard. Void (#FAF8F6 light / #050505 dark) is the background. Only brand with light/dark mode. Fonts: Futura Condensed / DM Sans / Exo 2.

shopimate._designNotes: Rose Gold (#B76E79) is the primary across website, widget, and dashboard. Noir (#121212) is the background. Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk / Switzer.

noir-dore._note: Former Concierge brand. Do NOT use for new tenants. Do NOT serve assets from production. Kept for historical reference only.
